title: Writing a SQL Query
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a simple SQL query (e.g., 'SELECT * FROM table_name') based on a given database schema (e.g., 'users', 'orders').
constraints: Must use the SQL SELECT statement

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated query follows proper SQL syntax.
Check if the generated query adheres to the SQL statement and table name constraints.
Evaluate if the generated query is effective for retrieving desired data.
